keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Saint Martin 1, Anguilla 0. Stanley Segarel (Saint Martin) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jérémy Peterson-Dutoya.
Goal!  Saint Martin 2, Anguilla 0. Stanley Segarel (Saint Martin) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Saint Martin 3, Anguilla 0. Stanley Segarel (Saint Martin) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ismaël Petchy.
Substitution, Anguilla. Kyle Lake-Bryan replaces Steve Austin.
Substitution, Anguilla. Jauron Gayle replaces Jonathan Guishard.
Goal!  Saint Martin 4, Anguilla 0. Stanley Segarel (Saint Martin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Saint Martin 5, Anguilla 0. Emmanuel Richardson (Saint Martin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ismaël Petchy.
Kayne Connor (Anguilla) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Luke Paris (Anguilla) is shown the red card.
Substitution, Anguilla. Javis Jones replaces Germain Hughes.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Yannick Bellechasse replaces Yoann Vardin.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Steven Laguerre replaces Pierre-Bertrand Arné.
Substitution, Anguilla. Sedu Bradshaw replaces Alexander Fleming.
Substitution, Saint Martin. André Richardson replaces Ismaël Petchy.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Axel Raga Rigobert replaces Stanley Segarel.
Goal!  Saint Martin 6, Anguilla 0. Axel Raga Rigobert (Saint Martin) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the top left corner.
Goal!  Saint Martin 7, Anguilla 0. Axel Raga Rigobert (Saint Martin) header from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Stéphan Varsovie with a cross.
Substitution, Anguilla. Delani Francis replaces Vershawn Hodge.
Substitution, Saint Martin. Max Carty replaces Jérémy Peterson-Dutoya.
Goal!  Saint Martin 8, Anguilla 0. Axel Raga Rigobert (Saint Martin) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Yannick Bellechasse with a cross   following a corner.
Second Half ends, Saint Martin 8, Anguilla 0.
